    def test_get_announcement_list_success(self):
        """
        Purpose: Verify that announcement list is returned successfully (public endpoint)
        """
        with allure.step("Send GET request"):
            url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/announcement/"
            response = requests.get(url)
    
        with allure.step("Verify status code is 200"):
            assert response.status_code == 200, (
                f"Expected: 200, Got: {response.status_code} | {response.text}"
            )
    
        with allure.step("Verify response is valid JSON"):
            data = response.json()
            assert data is not None, "Response JSON is None"
    
        with allure.step("Verify response contains required fields"):
            for field in ["page", "total_pages", "top_per_page",
